DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT PACIFIC BELL TELEPHONE COMPANY'S MOITON TO COMPEL PHYSICAL AND MENTAL EXAMINATIONS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PHYSICAL AND MENTAL EXAMINATIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF, THROUGH HER COMPLAINT AND DISCOVERY RESPONSES HAS CLEARLY PLACED HER PHYSICAL INJURY AND EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AT ISSUE AND DEFENDANT HAS MET THE REQUIREMENTS UNDER CCP SECTION 2032.320. IN ADDITION, THE COURT STATED THAT BOTH EXAMS ARE TO BE COMPLETED WITHIN 60 DAYS. PARTIES TO MEET & CONFER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.)
